headline: Your Dream Job Awaits: Hidden Valley Ranch is Hiring Four "Ranch-bassadors" for a Flavor Quest Across Europe
summary: Ranch fans, grab your passports. This National Ranch Day, and in celebration of America's upcoming 250th anniversary, Hidden Valley Ranch is taking its biggest adventure yet. Today, the brand announced the Hidden Valley Ranch-bassador Program, a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for ranch lovers to spread The Flavor of America abroad—and get paid while doing it.
